title: Project Vanilla Enhanced
description: This is a Vanilla plus modpack to spice up your game with stunning visuals and quality of life features
body:
NOTE:
Please allocate 4 GBs of RAM or more for this modpack to run well. Thanks :)
____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Project Vanilla Enhanced
A feature-rich expansion of vanilla Minecraft, designed to enhance your experience while staying true to the game’s original charm.

🧱 Vanilla, But Better
Project Vanilla Enhanced preserves the core gameplay of Minecraft while thoughtfully expanding on it. The goal is to elevate the experience without replacing what makes vanilla special.

⚙️ Expanded Modlist
This isn’t a lightweight pack — it features a robust modlist that adds depth, utility, and customization across all aspects of the game. From powerful building tools to reworked systems, there’s something for every type of player.

🎮 Quality-of-Life Improvements
Enjoy smart enhancements like better inventory management, UI tweaks, and convenient features that reduce tedium and streamline gameplay — all while feeling native to the game.

🚀 Performance & Stability Optimizations
Even with a large modlist, the pack is optimized for smoother performance and better stability, ensuring a playable experience on modern systems.

🎨 Visual Upgrades
Get a cleaner, more immersive visual experience with improved lighting, animations, and environmental effects — designed to enhance atmosphere without straying into over-stylization.
